title: About Me
subtitle: Get to know me
description: Full Stack Developer with over 2 years of experience, I design and build modern, performant, and user-centered web and mobile applications.
With a background in Software Engineering, I have strengthened my skills through numerous hands-on projects, from complete web applications to Android mobile apps such as the Rakibolana Malagasy.
Passionate about technological innovation, I constantly stay up to date with the latest development trends. My goal: to create digital solutions that deliver real value.
